DECLARATION OF PHILIP A SEGAL IN SUPPORT OF PLAINTIFFS OPPOSITION TO DEFENDANTS MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT (TRANSACTION ID # 62586055) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DESOTO CAB COMPANY, INC.

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT GERALD MICHAEL PACHECO'S MOTION TO VACATE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS DENIED. PACHECO FAILS TO DEMONSTRATE GOOD CAUSE FOR RELIEF UNDER CCP 473.5. AT PARAGRAPH 12 OF THIS DECLARATION, PACHECO ADMITS THAT HE KNEW OF THE LAWSUIT APPROXIMATELY THREE MONTHS PRIOR TO THE ENTRY OF THE DEFAULT. PACHECO FAILS TO DEMONSTRATE GOOD CAUSE FOR RELIEF UNDER CCP 473. HE DOES NOT EXPLAIN HOW MISTAKE, SURPRISE, INADVERTENCE, OR EXCUSABLE NEGLECT CAUSED THE DEFAULT TO BE ENTERED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: RICHARD ULMER; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600 =302/RU

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Oct-26-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Atty. Adolph O. karashi of Kern Segal & Murray, Tel. No. 1-415-474-1900
appearing for the Plaintiff;
Atty. Larisa K. Raymundo of Gilsleider, Mcmahon, Molinelli & Phan, Tel. No.
1-925-446-3117 appearing for the Defendant by Telephone appearance.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendant Gerald Michael Pacheco's motion to vacate default and default judgment is DENIED. Pacheco fails to demonstrate good cause for relief under CCP 473.5. At paragraph 12 of this declaration, Pacheco admits that he knew of the lawsuit approximately three months prior to the entry of the default. Pacheco fails to demonstrate good cause for relief under CCP 473. He does not explain how mistake, surprise, inadvertence, or excusable neglect caused the default to be entered. Order signed in open court. Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600 =302/ru
